subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath shown in a true vision that which shall sustain thy steps upon the straight path, by the True One, verily the heart is filled with sorrow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اراه الله فی الرویاء الصادقه ما یثبت قدمیه علی الصراط تالله الحق ان القلب لفی اسف
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @prayer for opponents; enemies of the Faith, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
